main.1: On November 30, 2016, the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) released a circular C168 that prohibits brokers from providing deposit bonuses. The changes outlined in the circular apply not only to us, but to the entire regulated binary options industry.
main.2: As a regulated broker, we follow every regulatory directive. Thus, starting from the 12th of December 2016 all of the deposit bonuses will no longer be available on our trading platform.
